recent_projects.name: coffea
recent_projects.summary: Basic tools and wrappers for enabling not-too-alien syntax when running columnar Collider HEP analysis.

recent_projects.name: agent-mcp-gateway
recent_projects.summary: An MCP gateway that aggregates your existing MCP servers and lets you define which servers and individual tools each agent or subagent can access. Solves Claude Code's MCP context window waste where all tool definitions load upfront instead of being discovered when actually needed.
